name: kiet movie society
description:
Formed in 2018, KIET Movie Society (KMS) is a vibrant community dedicated to the art of filmmaking and cinematic storytelling. Beyond producing short films for competitions and presentations, KMS provides a creative platform where students can explore their passion for cinematography, direction, acting, scriptwriting, editing, make-up, and production.

The society also organizes weekly movie screenings in the KIET Auditorium every scheduled Sunday, promoting entertainment and fostering a culture of cinema appreciation within the campus.Our domains include:

  Production(Photography | Cinematography | Editing)
  Acting – Bring characters to life!
Content Writing – Script ideas that shine.
    Graphics & Creative Arts – Posters, sets, props & more.
      Management – Plan and execute shoots & events.
        Makeup & Costume – Style characters with creativity.
